intro_zh: 先听完整课文，再把“路线 -> 出发 -> 目标 -> 多年训练 -> 父亲焦急看护 -> 休息计划 -> 同学等待 -> 妈妈也曾横渡”的计划链读顺。注意 future chunks 和 route phrases 后面要自然小停顿。

sentences.text: Debbie Hart is going to swim across the English Channel tomorrow.
sentences.focus_zh: is going to swim 是明天已经计划好的挑战；across the English Channel 要作为一个路线短语读完整。

sentences.text: She is going to set out from the French coast at five o'clock in the morning.
sentences.focus_zh: set out 表示出发；from the French coast 和 at five o'clock 是地点与时间，读时分组清楚。

sentences.text: Debbie is only eleven years old and she hopes to set up a new world record.
sentences.focus_zh: only eleven years old 后面小停；set up a new world record 要读出目标感。

sentences.text: Mr. Hart has trained his daughter for years.
sentences.focus_zh: has trained 表示训练从过去持续到现在；for years 不要漏读，说明这不是临时冒险。

sentences.text: Tomorrow he will be watching her anxiously as she swims the long distance to England.
sentences.focus_zh: will be watching 是持续看护；as she swims 后接长距离路线，语气要稳。

sentences.text: Debbie intends to take short rests every two hours.
sentences.focus_zh: intends to 是打算；take short rests every two hours 要读成一个清楚的计划。

sentences.text: Most of Debbie's school friends will be waiting for her on the English coast.
sentences.focus_zh: will be waiting 表示同学们会一直等待；on the English coast 是终点地点。

sentences.text: Among them will be Debbie's mother, who swam the Channel herself when she was a girl.
sentences.focus_zh: Among them will be 是正式倒装；最后一句要读成温暖的家庭故事揭示。
